item.name: Anden III Horn
item.description: When blown, this sheep's horn emits a muted (and somewhat confused) sound that brings Anden III rustling to your side.

mount.name: Anden III
mount.action: Summon forth Anden III. It has a mouth, but it cannot scream.
mount.description: In gratitude for your kindness, the pixie Eo Tyr gifted you this peculiar ambulatory plant, which they created from the leaves of the original Anden after pruning him. While it resembles its namesake, it lacks the power of speech, and there is no telling what thoughts lie behind its permanently horrified expression.
mount.tooltip:
Kind-hearted as we pixies are,
we decided to turn him into
a lovely leafman!
- Sheep-obsessed Pixie
